# issueImportCheckCSV

Checks a CSV file validity against a specific import service.

- Root: `Queries`
- Return Type: [`IssueImportCheckPayload`](../objects/issue_import_check_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `service` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The service the CSV containing data from. |
